name: practitioner_bulk_loader
description: Bulk-load practitioners from a CSV file: validates records, detects duplicates, and creates or additively merges FHIR Practitioner resources with staff keys returned on completion.

applications.name: Staff Loader
applications.description: Upload a CSV to create or update multiple practitioners at once.

protocols.description: REST endpoints for CSV template download, parse-and-validate, and create-practitioners.
